entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Long-term shift in temperatures and weather patterns affecting agricultural systems

entities.name: PESTS
entities.description: Organisms that damage crops and are affected by climate change

entities.name: DISEASES
entities.description: Pathological conditions affecting crops and altered by climate change

entities.name: WEEDS
entities.description: Unwanted plants that compete with crops and are affected by climate change

entities.name: EXTREME CLIMATE EVENTS
entities.description: Severe weather events that are altered by climate change

entities.name: WATER RESOURCES
entities.description: Availability and management of water for agriculture

entities.name: SOIL DEGRADATION
entities.description: Decline in soil quality caused by climate change

entities.name: SOCIO-ECONOMIC PRESSURES
entities.description: Social and economic factors impacting agricultural systems

entities.name: CARBON DIOXIDE CONCENTRATION
entities.description: The level of CO2 in the atmosphere, acting as a primary driver of change

entities.name: TEMPERATURE
entities.description: Atmospheric heat levels, acting as a primary driver of change

entities.name: WATER
entities.description: Availability of moisture for plants, acting as a primary driver of change

entities.name: CTW
entities.description: The combined influence of carbon dioxide, temperature, and water changes

entities.name: CROP GROWTH
entities.description: The process of a plant growing from seed to maturity

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL SYSTEMS
entities.description: The complex of biological and human components in farming

entities.name: CROP YIELDS
entities.description: The amount of crop produced per unit area

entities.name: CROP MODELS
entities.description: Biophysical, process-based tools used to investigate crop responses

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL CONDITIONS
entities.description: External factors such as weather and soil that influence crop responses

entities.name: FARM MANAGEMENT TECHNIQUES
entities.description: Human-led practices in crop cultivation

entities.name: CLIMATE IMPACT ASSESSMENT
entities.description: The process of evaluating how climate change affects agriculture

entities.name: SITE-BASED CROP MODEL
entities.description: A crop model applied to a specific geographic location

entities.name: GLOBAL CLIMATE MODEL
entities.description: Large-scale simulations of the Earth's climate used for scenarios

entities.name: DOWNSCALING TECHNIQUE
entities.description: Method to translate global climate data to local scales

entities.name: CROPS
entities.description: Cultivated plants used for food or other purposes
